## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss SEO content strategy, results, and new initiatives for Attention\<\>GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/rtnwyctAMTDzU2zQMyHJuZoot9z6Ytea?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [24 articles published, 17 more in pipeline; early results show 257 impressions, 0 clicks (7/24 indexed)](https://fathom.video/share/rtnwyctAMTDzU2zQMyHJuZoot9z6Ytea?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [New initiative: Creating biographical content for 100+ profiles using AI (AirOps integration discussed)](https://fathom.video/share/rtnwyctAMTDzU2zQMyHJuZoot9z6Ytea?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Content strategy adjustment needed; focus on expanding high-performing topics (e.g., sandal-selling system)](https://fathom.video/share/rtnwyctAMTDzU2zQMyHJuZoot9z6Ytea?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Website speed issues resolved; third-party Webflow plugin removed to improve performance](https://fathom.video/share/rtnwyctAMTDzU2zQMyHJuZoot9z6Ytea?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
